strengths: ~17 years of professional engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform, 2016–present) and built and shipped multiple open-source tools
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (~1 year at re:cinq); no demonstrated large-scale AI products, platforms, or recognized external AI thought leadership
Career tops out at 'Staff Software Engineer' — no evidence of director-level scope, strategic advisory experience, or influencing engineering strategy across organizations
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; both degrees are bachelor's-level (CS and Fine Arts/Image Processing), missing the preferred advanced qualification for this role
response.justification: The role requires recognized, director-level AI expertise with a track record of building AI products and advising strategic customers — none of which this résumé demonstrates at the required depth. The candidate's only AI work is ~14 months old and scoped to tooling (MCP generators, agentic frameworks), not platform-scale AI strategy. Career progression has stalled at 'Staff Software Engineer' with no evidence of cross-organizational influence, executive advisory, or strategic thought leadership. The 15-year experience floor is met (career started ~2006–2009), and the GISCollective founding shows entrepreneurial instinct, but these positives do not offset the critical gaps in AI depth, leadership seniority, and advanced credentials this principal-level AI strategy role demands.
